mapper.select:
SELECT rv.recipe_video_id, rv.video_title, rv.thumbnail_url, rv.video_url, rv.view_count, rv.user_view_count, rv.duration, i.item_id, i.item_name FROM recipe_video rv JOIN ( SELECT recipe_video_id FROM recipe_video WHERE ( video_title LIKE '%15분%' OR video_title LIKE '%10분%' OR video_title LIKE '%5분%' OR video_title LIKE '%간단%' OR video_title LIKE '%뚝딱%' ) OR ( duration IS NOT NULL AND LPAD(duration, 5, '0') < '15:00' ) ORDER BY view_count DESC LIMIT 3 ) top_recipes ON rv.recipe_video_id = top_recipes.recipe_video_id
LEFT JOIN recipe_items ri ON rv.recipe_video_id = ri.recipe_video_id LEFT JOIN items i ON ri.item_id = i.item_id
ORDER BY rv.view_count DESC

SELECT rv.recipe_video_id, rv.video_title, rv.thumbnail_url, rv.video_url, rv.view_count, rv.user_view_count, rv.duration, i.item_id, i.item_name FROM recipe_video rv JOIN ( SELECT recipe_video_id FROM recipe_video ORDER BY user_view_count DESC, view_count DESC LIMIT 3 ) top_recipes ON rv.recipe_video_id = top_recipes.recipe_video_id
LEFT JOIN recipe_items ri ON rv.recipe_video_id = ri.recipe_video_id LEFT JOIN items i ON ri.item_id = i.item_id
ORDER BY rv.user_view_count DESC, rv.view_count DESC

SELECT rv.recipe_video_id, rv.video_title, rv.video_url, rv.duration, rv.category_id, rs.step_number, rs.step_title, rs.content FROM recipe_video rv LEFT JOIN recipe_steps rs ON rv.recipe_video_id = rs.recipe_video_id WHERE rv.recipe_video_id = #{recipeVideoId} ORDER BY rs.step_number
SELECT recipe_video_id, video_title, thumbnail_url, duration FROM recipe_video WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND recipe_video_id != #{recipeVideoId} ORDER BY view_count DESC LIMIT 3
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO liked_recipe (user_id, recipe_video_id, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{recipeVideoId}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM liked_recipe WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND recipe_video_id = #{recipeVideoId}
mapper.select: SELECT rv.recipe_video_id, rv.video_title, rv.thumbnail_url FROM recipe_video rv JOIN completed_recipe cr ON rv.recipe_video_id = cr.recipe_video_id WHERE cr.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY cr.completed_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO completed_recipe (user_id, recipe_video_id, completed_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{recipeVideoId}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM completed_recipe WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND recipe_video_id = #{recipeVideoId}
mapper.select: SELECT rv.recipe_video_id, rv.video_title, rv.thumbnail_url FROM recipe_video rv JOIN liked_recipe cr ON rv.recipe_video_id = cr.recipe_video_id WHERE cr.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY cr.created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT MONTH(completed_at) as month, COUNT(*) as count FROM completed_recipe WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND completed_at >= #{startDate} GROUP BY MONTH(completed_at) ORDER BY month ASC

SELECT c.category_name as categoryName, COUNT(*) as count FROM liked_recipe lr JOIN recipe_video rv ON lr.recipe_video_id = rv.recipe_video_id JOIN category c ON rv.category_id = c.category_id WHERE lr.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY c.category_name
